steps.title: Read the variables
steps.content: The variable $x$ counts six-month periods since the end of January $1995$. The vertical value gives the estimated number of online newsletter subscribers.

steps.title: Interpret the point
steps.content: The point $(1, 500)$ means that when $x=1$, the subscriber estimate is $500$. Since $x=1$ is the end of the first six-month period, the statement must describe that time and that subscriber count.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: The statement that says the estimated number of subscribers at the end of the first six-month period was $500$ matches the point. The answer is A.
